title: PolyHitbox
body: # PolyHitbox ![Compact Powered by OneConfig](https://polyfrost.org/img/compact_vector.svg) ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/PolyHitbox.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) A hitbox modification mod ## Features - Toggle Keybind - Show Condition - Always / Hovered / Toggled / Never - Dashed Lines - Outline - Eye Height - View Ray ## Gallery ![settings-page.png](https://github.com/Polyfrost/PolyHitbox/raw/main/images/settings-page.png)
